name: Buddy Skill Creator
description: Distill your ideal buddy into an AI Skill. Import chat history, photos, social media posts, or just describe your dream buddy — generate Vibe Memory + Persona with continuous evolution. Powered by evolink.ai | 把理想搭子蒸馏成 AI Skill，导入聊天记录、照片、社交媒体，或纯粹描述你的理想搭子，生成默契记忆 + 人格，支持持续进化。
author: EvoLinkAI

dataTransmission.api.evolink.ai: When AI analysis features are used (persona extraction, vibe analysis, chat generation), user-provided materials (chat logs, descriptions) are sent to api.evolink.ai for processing by Claude. No data is stored by EvoLink after the response is returned. AI features require explicit opt-in via EVOLINK_API_KEY.
